overview: WebStore is a premium marketplace for buying and selling websites, featuring an ultra-modern dark theme with neon accents, glassmorphism effects, and world-class interactive UI.
features: Glassmorphism navbar with animated scroll effects
Animated hero section with parallax gradients and floating cards
Interactive service and feature cards with hover glow effects
Customer reviews carousel with smooth auto-scroll
FAQ accordion with smooth expand/collapse animations
Pricing comparison table with highlighted tiers
Premium dark footer with social links and hover animations
Browse marketplace with glass filter panel and animated listing cards
Seller and Buyer dashboards with glass panels and glowing borders
